path_b_status.reason: Vendored FP8 e4m3fn MSL kernels (LUT-based decode + integer-bit encode) are compiled and ready to dispatch.

rows.label: path_c_mlx_tilelang_fp8_scaled_vecmat
rows.variant: MLX-dispatched TileLang fp8 vecmat packed dot4

required_fast_path.packed_uint32_fp8_loads: reinterpret_cast<device const uint*> loads for 4 FP8 bytes
required_fast_path.packed_or_word_dot4_decode: packed/word dot4 decode in the hot loop
required_fast_path.no_scalar_fp8_helper_calls: avoid per-byte __tvm_fp8_e4m3_to_half calls in the hot loop
